LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS DANIEL GEBREMICHAEL AND J.C. DECAUX, SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE (SANTA CLARA COUNTY). COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. IT APPEARS THAT J. C. DECAUX CAN BE SUED IN SAN FRANCISCO. ALTHOUGH IT IS A DISSOLVED CORPORATION, THERE IS NO EVIDENCE WHETHER IT HAS OR DOES NOT HAVE ASSETS IN SAN FRANCISCO. IT ALSO LISTS SAN FRANCISCO AS ITS PRINCIPAL PLACE OF BUSINESS AND ITS AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS IS IN SAN FRANCISCO. HOWEVER BASED ON THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, SANTA CLARA COUNTY IS A FAR MORE CONVENIENT FORUM FOR THIRD PARTY WITNESSES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
CHANGE OF VENUE FEE FILED BY DEFENDANT JC DECAUX SF INC GEBREMICHAEL, DANIEL TEKLE DOES 1 THROUGH 100 INCLUSIVE JCDECAUX SAN FRANCISCO, INC. (ERRONEOUSLY SUED HEREIN AS JC DECAUX SF, INC)
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-27-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
